title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Adhesives & Allied Products - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!
